purpose: AI-powered Third Party Risk Management platform for automating vendor risk assessments, compliance monitoring, and audit workflows

users.primary: Security and compliance analysts at Sleep Number

ai_agents.VERA: Vendor Evaluation & Risk Assessment - calculates risk profiles
ai_agents.CARA: Comprehensive Assessment & Review Agent - performs assessments
ai_agents.DORA: Document Orchestration & Retrieval Agent - retrieves and manages documents
ai_agents.SARA: Security Analysis & Risk Assessment - identifies risk findings
ai_agents.RITA: Report Intelligence & Template Agent - generates reports
ai_agents.MARS: Mitigation Action & Remediation System - manages remediation actions
